title: Dialysis Mission and Vision
content:
Dialysis Mission and Vision

MISSION: Has qualified and sufficient vocational technical education knowledge and skills that can apply quality and economic health services, which are based on ethical values, respect patient rights, care about patient and employee safety, and include preventive health studies in addition to therapeutic practices, regardless of religion, language, race and gender. to train dialysis technicians.

VISION: In dialysis service; has determined the reliability, respectability and patient satisfaction as the main target, preferred by the business world, innovative, suitable for the needs of the age and self-confident, has a sustainable education system, educates highly qualified workforce that will contribute to the economy, and is accepted at national and international level. To be a reliable higher education program.
